---
title: "About Me"
toc: false
---

## Hi, I'm Owen Heap

![](assets/owenheadshot.png){width=200px style="border-radius:50%; float:right; margin-left:2rem;"}

I'm studying data science and have a passion for using data to tell compelling stories. I enjoy exploring data, building models, and creating visualizations that help others understand complex information.

---

## Background

- Senior Studying Data Science at Brigham Young University - Idaho
- I love using data to solve problems and tell a story
- Currently working on improving my skills in machine learning and data visualization through classes and personal projects

---

## Skills

```{=html}
<div class="skills-strip">
  <span class="skill-pill">R</span>
  <span class="skill-pill">Pandas</span>
  <span class="skill-pill">ggplot2</span>
  <span class="skill-pill">tidyverse</span>
  <span class="skill-pill">Quarto</span>
  <span class="skill-pill">SQL</span>
  <span class="skill-pill">Statistics</span>
  <span class="skill-pill">Data Visualization</span>
  <span class="skill-pill">Machine Learning</span>
</div>
```

---

## Contact

- 📧 [ooheap@gmail.com](mailto:ooheap@gmail.com)
- 🐙 [github.com/ooheap](https://github.com/ooheap)
- 💼 [linkedin.com/in/owen-heap](https://www.linkedin.com/in/owen-heap-574a572b6/)
